EmailTemplate.description: Survey Link for Customer after Site Visit is Done
EmailTemplate.name: Survey Notification After Site Visit
EmailTemplate.subject: Site Visit Feedback Survey - Runwal Homes
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Survey__c.Account_Name__c},
Thank you for taking the time to visit us at {!Survey__c.Project__c}.
We hope that your visit was a pleasant one. In our quest to improve our services we would like to know your views on what you liked and what needs to improve at the {!Survey__c.Project__c} site. You are requested to please fill in this quick feedback form that will help us improve the experience at your next visit.
The feedback form can be accessed at the link blow:
{!Survey__c.Survey_Link__c}
Looking forward to your valuable feedback and hoping to see you as a customer with us soon.
Warm regards, Team {!Survey__c.Project__c}
